title: Designer
tagline: Design broadcast graphics with tools you know.
description: Build lower thirds, scoreboards, and tickers with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. No proprietary scripting languages. Your motion design skills translate directly — OGraf graphics are just web pages with a small manifest.

title: Developer
description: Web Components, standard lifecycle methods (load, play, stop, update), JSON Schema–based data definitions. Build once, validate with the official spec, ship to any OGraf-compatible renderer.

title: Broadcaster
description: EBU-backed standard. Multiple commercial and open-source renderers. Vendor-independent. Compare it against Vizrt, Chyron, and the rest — see which tools support it today and which are on their way.
